## What's in this PR
<!-- e.g. "New template: Quarterly OKR review" or "Emerald variation of Annual Results" -->

- **Template name:**
- **Category:** <!-- sales / financial / kpi / marketing / people / operations / strategy / review / analysis / deck / new -->
- **New design or a variation?**

## Checklist

- [ ] The report is a **single self-contained `.html`** in `templates/` (inline `<style>`/SVG/`<script>`; external CDNs only for fonts or Chart.js).
- [ ] I added an entry to the `REPORTS` array in `assets/app.js` (with `en` + `pt` `title` and `description`).
- [ ] Content is **generic and fictional** — no real, confidential, or company-identifying data. Uses `[placeholders]` and round sample numbers.
- [ ] Content is in **English**.
- [ ] The footer keeps the **OpenReports / Instituto Arkhe** credit line.
- [ ] I previewed it locally (`python -m http.server`) and it renders correctly.
